title: BL Screenshot Gallery [BLSG]
description: A modern in-game screenshot gallery for Minecraft that automatically saves where, when, and what biome every screenshot was taken in, with a clean visual browser directly inside Minecraft.
body:
# BL Screenshot Gallery (BLSG)
---
A modern in-game screenshot gallery for Minecraft that automatically saves where, when, and what biome every screenshot was taken in — with a clean visual browser directly inside Minecraft.

Perfect for builders, explorers, map makers, SMP players, content creators, and anyone who takes lots of screenshots and later forgets where they were taken.

✨ Features
---

🖼 In-Game Screenshot Gallery
--
Press F12 to open a fully integrated screenshot browser without leaving Minecraft.

Features include:

Grid-based gallery view
Smooth thumbnail previews
Pagination system
Search bar
Star/favorite screenshots
Timeline-style browsing

📍 Automatic Metadata Capture
--
Every screenshot automatically stores:

World / server name
Coordinates (X/Y/Z)
Biome
Dimension
Real-world date & time
Minecraft in-game day
Multiplayer detection
Camera rotation (yaw/pitch)

All metadata is saved into lightweight .json sidecar files next to the screenshot.

🔎 Powerful Search
-
Search screenshots by:

 Filename 
 World name 
 Server name 
 Biome 
 Dimension 
 Title 
 Notes 

Example searches:

 plains 
 nether 
 village  
 my base 
 survival server 
 📝 Titles & Notes 

Add custom:

Screenshot titles
Personal notes
Build reminders
Lore/context

Titles appear directly on thumbnails for quick identification.

⭐ Favorites System
-
Star important screenshots and quickly filter them later.

Perfect for:

Favorite builds
Coordinates worth revisiting
Progress milestones
Rare discoveries

🗑 Delete Screenshots In-Game
--
Delete screenshots directly from the gallery.

BLSG properly removes:

The PNG image
Thumbnail
Metadata JSON
Gallery entry

without needing to restart Minecraft.

🎨 Clean Modern UI
---
Designed to feel like a native Minecraft feature.

Includes:

Hover effects
Dynamic thumbnails
Responsive detail screen
Metadata panel
Large screenshot preview
Minimal visual clutter
⚡ Lightweight
No external dependencies
Minimal memory usage
Metadata stored locally
Fast thumbnail loading
Optimized caching

🧠 Why Use BLSG?
---
Vanilla Minecraft screenshots become chaotic over time.

BLSG turns them into a searchable visual archive.

Instead of:

"Where did I build that?"

you get:

"Oh yeah — Plains biome, Day 184, SMP world."

📦 Metadata Example
---
![Metadata](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dce87b0cde045c7e61e68e5cebc0abc8753f4f4_0.webp)
  
⌨ Default Keybind
---
Action	Key
Open Gallery	F12

(Keybind can be changed in Minecraft Controls settings.)

🔧 Supported Loader
---
Fabric
